heading: Major defense acquisition program
label: 3042 Major defense acquisition program
text: For the definition of the term “major defense acquisition program” for purposes of this part, see .section 4201 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3061 was renumbered .section 7061 of this title
